_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Used by `timelog.sh cost` to price turn_end token rows. Cache multipliers (Anthropic standard): cache_write_5m = 1.25x input, cache_write_1h = 2x input, cache_read = 0.1x input. Base input/output rates cached 2026-05-26 from the claude-api skill; verify current rates at https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/pricing . Cost is computed at report time from this file, NOT stored per row, so editing these rates re-prices history correctly.
